action: Click event in list to navigate to Event Workspace (M21)
expected: Events list loads, click navigates to /events/[eventId], workspace shows selected event data
actual: BLOCKED — agent-browser has no authenticated Clerk session. Navigation to /events triggers Clerk handshake loop (dev-browser-missing) and redirects to /login. Login page shows 'Contact your admin for access' with no sign-in form available to agent-browser.
blocked_reason: agent-browser Super Admin auth/session unavailable. Clerk dev-browser handshake fails repeatedly (no session cookies in agent-browser Chrome profile). Login page shows 'Contact your admin for access' — no interactive sign-in form available for agent automation.
redaction_reason: Clerk auth/session query parameters removed before commit.
